text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with
Matikanefukukitaru...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look over there, Trainer! What else<n>could that be
but a lucky omen!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru points toward a<n>claw machine
filled with Umamusume<n>plushies.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's horoscope said my lucky<n>item is a
plushie!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki wanted this<n>encounter to
happen, guiding me here<n>to this very spot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just know super-ultra-mega-great<n>fortune will
come my way if a certain<n>lucky trainer wins one
for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I have great faith that<n>you'll reel in a
whole bunch!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can see it already! You'll be hauling<n>them in by
the boatload! You'll be the<n>envy of all the other
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
